diary.aiTip5: Scan vet prescriptions and I'll organize everything
diary.helpModalSub: This is the heart of the app. The AI interprets everything and organizes it in {{name}}'s Panel.
diary.helpPanelNote: All content is classified by AI and automatically saved in your pet's Panel.
diary.helpVoice: Tell what happened. The AI transcribes, interprets, and narrates about {{name}}.
diary.helpPhoto: Take a photo of anything — pet, feces, plant, wound, food or vet prescription. AI analyzes and records. Limit: up to 5 photos, max. 5 MB each. Only 3 photos are analyzed by AI.
diary.helpScanner: Scan receipts, vet prescriptions, health plans, or insurance policies. OCR + AI extract and organize everything.
diary.helpDocument: Send a PDF or file. AI reads, interprets and automatically classifies in the pet Panel. Limit: 1 document per entry, max. 10 MB.
diary.helpVideo: Record your pet in action. AI analyzes behavior, mood and visual health. Limit: 1 video per entry, max. 60s and 50 MB.
diary.helpGallery: Select photos or videos from your gallery. AI processes and adds to pet history. Limit: up to 5 photos (3 analyzed by AI) + 1 video, max. 5 MB per photo and 50 MB per video.
diary.helpListen: Record pet sounds — barks, meows, breathing. AI detects emotion and health status. Limit: 1 audio per entry, max. 30s and 5 MB.
diary.helpText: Prefer writing? Type freely and the AI narrates about {{name}}.

diary.aiInfoIntro: Each level uses the same models — only the prompt depth and the maximum response size change.
diary.aiInfoFooter: Estimated times for a full entry (1 video + 2 photos + 1 audio + 1 scanner + 5 clinical metrics + narration). Lighter entries scale down proportionally.
diary.aiInfoOffDesc: Entry saved without analysis. Only the tutor's media and text.
diary.aiInfoFastDesc: Essential classification. 1-2 factual sentences in the narration. Basic data extraction.
diary.aiInfoBalancedDesc: Classification with key data. 80-120 word narration. Photo analysis with main clinical findings.
diary.aiInfoDeepDesc: Full specialist analysis. Up to 150-word narration with RAG context. Clinical metrics and detailed recommendations.

help.title: Help & Support
help.faqDesc: Most common questions about the app
help.reportBugDesc: Something not working? Let us know

faqItems.q1: How do I register my pet?
faqItems.a1: On the main screen, tap 'New Pet'. You can take a photo and AI identifies the breed, or register manually.
faqItems.q2: Biometrics don't work, what do I do?
faqItems.a2: Log in with email and password first. Then close and reopen the app — biometrics will work next time.
faqItems.q3: Can I register animals other than dogs and cats?
faqItems.a3: For now, AuExpert is exclusive to dogs and cats. New animals may be added in the future.
faqItems.q4: How does AI photo analysis work?
faqItems.a4: Take a photo of your pet and AI identifies breed, estimates age, size and health observations. Always confirm or edit the results.
faqItems.q5: Does the app work without internet?
faqItems.a5: Yes! You can still see your data and make changes. When internet returns, everything syncs automatically.
faqItems.q6: What are the size limits for photos, videos and documents?
faqItems.a6:
Photo: up to 5 MB, max 5 per entry.
Video: up to 50 MB, max 60 seconds, 1 per entry.
Audio (barks/sounds): up to 5 MB, max 30 seconds, 1 per entry.
Scanner/Document: up to 10 MB, max 20 pages, 1 per entry.
If a file exceeds the limit, you will see a warning before sending.

help.panelDesc: AI automatically identifies these 20 types of information in your pet's diary.

lensDesc.vaccine: Vaccination records, boosters and expiration dates detected automatically.
lensDesc.medication: Medicines, doses, frequency and ongoing treatments.
lensDesc.allergy: Allergic reactions, intolerances and substances to avoid.
lensDesc.consultation: Vet visits, diagnoses and guidance received.
lensDesc.surgery: Surgical procedures, anaesthesia and post-operative recovery.
lensDesc.symptom: Signs of discomfort, behavioural changes and health indicators.
lensDesc.exam: Lab results, reports and diagnostic images.
lensDesc.weight: Weight history, variations and trends over time.
lensDesc.clinical_metric: Temperature, heart rate, saturation and other clinical data.
lensDesc.food: Diet, treats, brands, portions and dietary changes.
lensDesc.plan: Health plans, insurance and service contracts for your pet.
lensDesc.mood: Daily pet mood — happy, anxious, tired, ecstatic and more.
lensDesc.moment: Achievements, firsts, birthdays and important milestones.
lensDesc.connection: Emotional bonds, affection and quality time with the owner.
lensDesc.travel: Trips, outings, pet-friendly destinations and route logs.
lensDesc.expense: Pet expenses — vet, food, accessories and services.
lensDesc.boarding: Stays at hotels, daycares or boarding with caregivers.
lensDesc.dog_walker: Walks with a dog walker, frequency and service notes.
lensDesc.grooming: Bath, trim, ear cleaning and cosmetic care sessions.
lensDesc.photo_analysis: AI-generated analyses from photos of your pet.

legal.privacyIntro: AuExpert respects your privacy. Here's how we protect your data:
legal.privacyData: Your data is protected on Supabase with encryption and Row Level Security. Only you can access your pets' data.
legal.privacyPhotos: Your pets' photos are stored securely and never shared with third parties.
legal.privacyAi: AI analyzes photos and texts only to generate insights about your pet. No data is used to train models.
legal.privacyDelete: You can delete your account and all data at any time in settings.
legal.termsIntro: By using AuExpert, you agree to these terms:
legal.termsUse: The app is for personal use by dog and cat owners. Commercial use is not allowed.
legal.termsAi: AI analyses are estimates and DO NOT replace veterinary consultations. Always consult a professional.
legal.termsContent: You are responsible for the content you publish (photos, texts). Offensive content will be removed.
legal.termsChanges: We may update these terms. You will be notified about important changes.

nutrition.foodCarrotNote: Raw or cooked, in small pieces
nutrition.foodCheeseNote: Small amounts, some pets are intolerant
nutrition.foodChocolateNote: Theobromine is toxic to dogs and cats
nutrition.aiNote: {{name}} has a well-balanced diet! Protein levels are great and meal timing helps with digestion. Keep it up, dedicated tutor!
nutrition.noCurrentFood: No food registered yet. Tell the diary about {{name}}'s nutrition!
nutrition.aiHintRecords: Tell the diary about {{name}}'s food or supplements and AI will register it here automatically!
nutrition.title: Nutrition
nutrition.subtitle: {{name}}'s diet
nutrition.alertLifeStageMismatch: Current food may not be ideal for this life stage.

nutrition.trocarHowTitle: How to register the new food
nutrition.trocarHowDesc: Say the food name, photograph the packaging, or type below. AI fills in the details automatically.
nutrition.trocarInputPlaceholder: E.g.: Royal Canin Adult Medium Breeds, 300g serving...
nutrition.trocarScanStepBack: Front captured! Now photo the back to extract nutrition info.
nutrition.trocarScanStepBackGallery: Front selected! Now select the back of the package.
nutrition.trocarGalleryBackSub: Select the back of the package
nutrition.trocarMismatchText: This food is for {{lifeStage}}s. {{name}} needs food for {{petStage}}s.
nutrition.trocarGradualSub: 5 days mixing the old and new food
nutrition.trocarOcrNoText: Could not extract text from the image. Try saying the food name instead.
nutrition.dicasError: Could not generate tips right now
nutrition.dicasEmpty: Add current food to get personalized AI analysis.
nutrition.soRacaoDesc: Dry or wet food as the exclusive base. Practical and balanced.
nutrition.racaoNaturalDesc: Combination of kibble with natural foods. Best of both worlds.
nutrition.soNaturalDesc: Natural / BARF diet without kibble. Requires veterinary supervision.
nutrition.topperHint: Small additions that enrich the meal
nutrition.warningVet: We recommend consulting a veterinary nutritionist
nutrition.soNaturalWarningDesc: Balancing a 100% natural diet is complex. A veterinary nutritionist ensures {{name}} gets all necessary nutrients.
nutrition.barfBone: Raw meaty bones or ground bone (10–15%)
nutrition.barfBenefit3: More stable energy throughout the day

insurance.aiInsightMock: {{name}} is well protected! Current plans cover the essentials nicely. Given their age, it might be worth looking into a dental plan — prevention is always cheaper than treatment.

mic.attachmentsLimits: Photo: up to 5 · 5 MB   Video: 1 · 60s · 50 MB   Audio: 1 · 30s   Doc: up to 3 · 10 MB
mic.audioChoiceRecordDesc: Capture barks, meows or breathing live
mic.audioChoiceFileDesc: Select an audio saved on your phone
mic.placeholder: Tap the mic and tell what happened with {{name}} today...
mic.helpMicDesc: Tell what happened with your pet. The AI transcribes and narrates automatically.
mic.helpFotoDesc: Take a photo right now. The AI analyzes the image and generates the narration on its own.
mic.helpVideoDesc: Record a video of your pet to capture special moments.
mic.helpSomDesc: Record barks, meows or any sound from your pet to keep in memory.
mic.helpGaleriaDesc: Import photos, videos, lab results, receipts, invoices or any document from your phone.
mic.helpFotoLimit: Max {{max}} MB per photo · up to {{count}} photos
mic.skipAIDesc: Text and media only — no AI narration
mic.helpAIToggleOnDesc: AI narrates, classifies, and generates lenses automatically. Per-type limits: up to 4 photos, 1 video, 1 audio, and 1 document per entry.
mic.helpAIToggleOffDesc: Text and media are saved without analysis or narration. Use 4 free slots in any combination: 4 photos, or 2 videos + 2 audios, or any mix up to 4 attachments.
mic.helpWifiDesc: Photos, videos, audios, and documents use data and take longer for the AI to analyse. Use a WiFi network whenever possible. Videos are the heaviest — the more videos in an entry, the longer the analysis will take.
